<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>GoParent — Train, Don't Just Learn</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fraunces:ital,opsz,wght@0,9..144,300;0,9..144,500;0,9..144,700;1,9..144,400&family=DM+Sans:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;1,300&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root {
  --bg: #f7f5ff;
  --teal: #00e5bc;
  --teal-dark: #00b894;
  --indigo: #3d2fb0;
  --indigo-dark: #2d2285;
  --indigo-light: #6c5ce7;
  --ink: #1a1630;
  --muted: #6e6a8a;
  --border: rgba(61,47,176,0.1);
  --white: #ffffff;
}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
body{background:var(--bg);color:var(--ink);font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:400;overflow-x:hidden;line-height:1.7;}
body::before{content:'';position:fixed;inset:0;background-image:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)' opacity='0.025'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");pointer-events:none;z-index:9999;opacity:0.5;}
.blob{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;filter:blur(90px);pointer-events:none;}
nav{position:fixed;top:0;width:100%;z-index:100;padding:16px 48px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;background:rgba(247,245,255,0.92);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
.nav-logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;}
.nav-cta{background:var(--indigo);color:#fff;border:none;padding:10px 26px;border-radius:100px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:0.875rem;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.25s ease;text-decoration:none;display:inline-block;}
.nav-cta:hover{background:var(--indigo-dark);transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(61,47,176,0.3);}
.hero{position:relative;min-height:100vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;text-align:center;padding:130px 24px 80px;overflow:hidden;}
.hero .b1{width:700px;height:700px;background:var(--teal);top:-200px;left:-200px;opacity:0.12;}
.hero .b2{width:600px;height:600px;background:var(--indigo);bottom:-150px;right:-150px;opacity:0.1;}
.hero .b3{width:350px;height:350px;background:var(--teal);top:20%;left:55%;opacity:0.07;}
.hero-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:rgba(0,229,188,0.12);border:1px solid rgba(0,229,188,0.35);color:var(--teal-dark);padding:8px 18px;border-radius:100px;font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:0.07em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:32px;opacity:0;animation:fadeUp 0.7s 0.2s ease forwards;}
.hero-badge::before{content:'';width:7px;height:7px;background:var(--teal);border-radius:50%;animation:pulse 2s infinite;}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}50%{opacity:0.4;transform:scale(1.6)}}
h1{font-family:'Fraunces',serif;font-size:clamp(2.8rem,6.5vw,5.8rem);font-weight:700;line-height:1.06;letter-spacing:-0.03em;color:var(--ink);max-width:840px;margin-bottom:24px;opacity:0;animation:fadeUp 0.8s 0.4s ease forwards;}
h1 em{font-style:italic;color:var(--indigo);}
.hero-sub{font-size:clamp(1rem,2vw,1.15rem);color:var(--muted);max-width:500px;margin-bottom:44px;opacity:0;animation:fadeUp 0.8s 0.6s ease forwards;}
.hero-actions{display:flex;gap:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;opacity:0;animation:fadeUp 0.8s 0.8s ease forwards;}
.btn-primary{background:var(--indigo);color:#fff;border:none;padding:15px 34px;border-radius:100px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:1rem;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.3s ease;text-decoration:none;display:inline-block;}
.btn-primary:hover{background:var(--indigo-dark);transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 14px 40px rgba(61,47,176,0.3);}
.btn-ghost{background:transparent;color:var(--muted);border:1.5px solid rgba(61,47,176,0.2);padding:15px 34px;border-radius:100px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:1rem;font-weight:400;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.3s ease;text-decoration:none;display:inline-block;}
.btn-ghost:hover{color:var(--indigo);border-color:rgba(61,47,176,0.5);}
.scroll-hint{position:absolute;bottom:36px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:8px;color:var(--muted);font-size:0.72rem;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;opacity:0;animation:fadeUp 1s 1.3s ease forwards;}
.scroll-hint::after{content:'';width:1px;height:36px;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,var(--muted),transparent);animation:scrollLine 2s ease infinite;}
@keyframes scrollLine{0%{transform:scaleY(0);transform-origin:top}50%{transform:scaleY(1);transform-origin:top}51%{transform:scaleY(1);transform-origin:bottom}100%{transform:scaleY(0);transform-origin:bottom}}
@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(28px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
.stats{border-top:1px solid var(--border);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:40px 48px;display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:clamp(28px,6vw,90px);flex-wrap:wrap;background:rgba(61,47,176,0.03);}
.stat{text-align:center;opacity:0;transform:translateY(18px);transition:all 0.6s ease;}
.stat.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}
.stat-num{font-family:'Fraunces',serif;font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,2.8rem);font-weight:700;color:var(--indigo);letter-spacing:-0.03em;display:block;}
.stat-label{font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:0.06em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:4px;}
section{padding:clamp(70px,9vw,130px) clamp(24px,6vw,80px);max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;}
.reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(22px);transition:opacity 0.65s ease,transform 0.65s ease;}
.reveal.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}
.reveal-delay-1{transition-delay:0.1s;}
.reveal-delay-2{transition-delay:0.2s;}
.reveal-delay-3{transition-delay:0.3s;}
.reveal-delay-4{transition-delay:0.4s;}
.reveal-left{opacity:0;transform:translateX(-28px);transition:opacity 0.7s ease,transform 0.7s ease;}
.reveal-left.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0);}
.reveal-right{opacity:0;transform:translateX(28px);transition:opacity 0.7s 0.15s ease,transform 0.7s 0.15s ease;}
.reveal-right.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0);}
.section-label{font-size:0.74rem;letter-spacing:0.13em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--teal-dark);margin-bottom:18px;font-weight:500;}
h2{font-family:'Fraunces',serif;font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,3.4rem);font-weight:700;line-height:1.1;letter-spacing:-0.03em;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:18px;}
h2 em{font-style:italic;color:var(--indigo);}
.section-desc{font-size:1.05rem;color:var(--muted);max-width:540px;line-height:1.8;}
.problem-layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:72px;align-items:center;margin-top:56px;}
.quote-card{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:24px;padding:40px;position:relative;box-shadow:0 6px 40px rgba(61,47,176,0.07);}
.quote-card::before{content:'".';font-family:'Fraunces',serif;font-size:8rem;color:var(--teal);opacity:0.18;position:absolute;top:-24px;left:20px;line-height:1;}
.quote-text{font-family:'Fraunces',serif;font-size:1.35rem;font-style:italic;color:var(--ink);line-height:1.55;margin-bottom:20px;}
.quote-name{font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--muted);}
.problem-point{display:flex;gap:18px;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:28px;}
.problem-icon{width:44px;height:44px;min-width:44px;border-radius:12px;background:rgba(0,184,148,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(0,184,148,0.22);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.2rem;}
.problem-point h3{font-size:1rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:5px;}
.problem-point p{font-size:0.9rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.65;}
.solution-header{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:72px;align-items:end;margin-bottom:56px;}
.step{display:grid;grid-template-columns:60px 1fr;gap:28px;align-items:start;padding:36px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
.step:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.step-num{font-family:'Fraunces',serif;font-size:2.8rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--teal-dark);opacity:0.25;line-height:1;padding-top:2px;}
.step h3{font-family:'Fraunces',serif;font-size:1.45rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:8px;}
.step p{color:var(--muted);font-size:0.92rem;line-height:1.7;}
.ravr-wrap{padding:0 clamp(16px,4vw,48px);max-width:1296px;margin:0 auto;}
.ravr-section{background:var(--indigo);border-radius:32px;padding:clamp(48px,6vw,80px);position:relative;overflow:hidden;text-align:center;}
.ravr-section .rb1{width:500px;height:500px;background:var(--indigo-light);top:-150px;right:-100px;opacity:0.25;}
.ravr-section .rb2{width:350px;height:350px;background:var(--teal);bottom:-100px;left:-80px;opacity:0.15;}
.ravr-label{display:inline-block;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.12);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);color:rgba(255,255,255,0.9);padding:8px 18px;border-radius:100px;font-size:0.74rem;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:20px;}
.ravr-number{font-family:'Fraunces',serif;font-size:clamp(4rem,10vw,8rem);font-weight:700;color:#fff;line-height:1;letter-spacing:-0.04em;display:block;margin-bottom:14px;}
.ravr-desc{font-size:1.05rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.72);max-width:480px;margin:0 auto 36px;}
.ravr-meter{max-width:380px;margin:0 auto;}
.meter-bar-bg{height:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.18);border-radius:100px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:10px;}
.meter-bar-fill{height:100%;background:linear-gradient(to right,var(--teal),#fff);border-radius:100px;width:0%;transition:width 2s 0.3s ease;}
.meter-labels{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:0.78rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);}
.features-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(270px,1fr));gap:18px;margin-top:56px;}
.feature-card{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:22px;padding:34px;box-shadow:0 2px 18px rgba(61,47,176,0.05);transition:all 0.3s ease;}
.feature-card:hover{box-shadow:0 10px 40px rgba(61,47,176,0.1);border-color:rgba(61,47,176,0.18);transform:translateY(-4px);}
.feature-emoji{font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:18px;display:block;}
.feature-card h3{font-family:'Fraunces',serif;font-size:1.15rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:9px;}
.feature-card p{font-size:0.88rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.7;}
.testimonials-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(290px,1fr));gap:18px;margin-top:56px;}
.testimonial-card{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:22px;padding:34px;box-shadow:0 2px 18px rgba(61,47,176,0.05);}
.stars{color:var(--teal-dark);font-size:0.85rem;margin-bottom:18px;letter-spacing:3px;}
.testimonial-text{font-family:'Fraunces',serif;font-style:italic;font-size:1rem;color:var(--ink);line-height:1.65;margin-bottom:22px;}
.testimonial-author{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:13px;}
.avatar{width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:600;font-family:'Fraunces',serif;flex-shrink:0;}
.av1{background:rgba(0,184,148,0.12);color:var(--teal-dark);}
.av2{background:rgba(61,47,176,0.1);color:var(--indigo);}
.av3{background:rgba(0,229,188,0.15);color:var(--teal-dark);}
.author-name{font-size:0.88rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--ink);}
.author-role{font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--muted);}
.cta-section{text-align:center;padding:100px 24px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.cta-section .cb1{width:600px;height:600px;background:var(--teal);top:-150px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);opacity:0.08;}
.cta-section .cb2{width:400px;height:400px;background:var(--indigo);bottom:-100px;left:10%;opacity:0.07;}
.cta-section h2{max-width:680px;margin:0 auto 20px;}
.cta-section .section-desc{margin:0 auto 44px;}
.email-form{display:flex;gap:10px;max-width:430px;margin:0 auto 14px;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;}
.email-input{flex:1;min-width:190px;background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:100px;padding:14px 22px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:0.95rem;color:var(--ink);outline:none;transition:border-color 0.2s,box-shadow 0.2s;}
.email-input::placeholder{color:var(--muted);}
.email-input:focus{border-color:var(--indigo);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(61,47,176,0.1);}
.cta-note{font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--muted);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:6px;}
footer{border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding:36px 48px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:18px;}
.footer-logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
.footer-copy{font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--muted);}
.footer-links{display:flex;gap:22px;}
.footer-links a{font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--muted);text-decoration:none;transition:color 0.2s;}
.footer-links a:hover{color:var(--indigo);}
.lang-toggle{position:fixed;bottom:26px;right:26px;z-index:200;display:flex;background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:100px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(61,47,176,0.12);}
.lang-btn{padding:9px 18px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:0.05em;background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;color:var(--muted);transition:all 0.2s;}
.lang-btn.active{background:var(--indigo);color:#fff;}
[data-es]{display:none;}[data-en]{display:inline;}
.es-active [data-es]{display:inline;}.es-active [data-en]{display:none;}
[data-es-block]{display:none;}[data-en-block]{display:block;}
.es-active [data-es-block]{display:block;}.es-active [data-en-block]{display:none;}
#successMsg{display:none;text-align:center;margin-top:22px;}
#successMsg p{font-family:'Fraunces',serif;font-size:1.3rem;color:var(--indigo);}
@media(max-width:780px){
  nav{padding:14px 20px;}
  .nav-logo img{height:36px;}
  .problem-layout,.solution-header{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:36px;}
  .stats{padding:28px 20px;gap:28px;}
  footer{padding:28px 20px;flex-direction:column;text-align:center;}
  .footer-links{justify-content:center;}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<nav>
  <div class="nav-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="GoParent icon" style="height:40px;display:block;"> <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="goparent" style="height:32px;display:block;"></div>
  <a href="#cta" class="nav-cta">
    <span data-en>Get Early Access</span>
    <span data-es>Acceso Anticipado</span>
  </a>
</nav>

<section class="hero">
  <div class="blob b1"></div><div class="blob b2"></div><div class="blob b3"></div>
  <div class="hero-badge">
    <span data-en>Behavioral Training &middot; Not Another Parenting App</span>
    <span data-es>Entrenamiento Conductual &middot; No otra app de crianza</span>
  </div>
  <h1>
    <span data-en>You know the theory.<br>We help you <em>live</em> it.</span>
    <span data-es>Ya sabes la teor&iacute;a.<br>Te ayudamos a <em>vivirla</em>.</span>
  </h1>
  <p class="hero-sub">
    <span data-en>GoParent is a daily behavioral training system that closes the gap between what you know as a parent and what you actually do &mdash; especially under stress.</span>
    <span data-es>GoParent es un sistema de entrenamiento conductual diario que cierra la brecha entre lo que sabes como padre y lo que realmente haces, especialmente bajo estr&eacute;s.</span>
  </p>
  <div class="hero-actions">
    <a href="#cta" class="btn-primary"><span data-en>Start Free Today</span><span data-es>Empieza Gratis Hoy</span></a>
    <a href="#how" class="btn-ghost"><span data-en>See How It Works</span><span data-es>C&oacute;mo Funciona</span></a>
  </div>
  <div class="scroll-hint"><span>Scroll</span></div>
</section>

<div class="stats">
  <div class="stat"><span class="stat-num">5 min</span><span class="stat-label"><span data-en>Per day</span><span data-es>Al d&iacute;a</span></span></div>
  <div class="stat"><span class="stat-num">0&ndash;12</span><span class="stat-label"><span data-en>Child age range</span><span data-es>Rango de edad</span></span></div>
  <div class="stat"><span class="stat-num">&ge;50%</span><span class="stat-label"><span data-en>RAVR target</span><span data-es>RAVR objetivo</span></span></div>
  <div class="stat"><span class="stat-num">12</span><span class="stat-label"><span data-en>Training modules</span><span data-es>M&oacute;dulos</span></span></div>
</div>

<section>
  <div class="section-label reveal"><span data-en>The Real Problem</span><span data-es>El Problema Real</span></div>
  <h2 class="reveal reveal-delay-1">
    <span data-en>You&rsquo;re not failing.<br>The system <em>failed you.</em></span>
    <span data-es>No est&aacute;s fallando.<br>El sistema <em>te fall&oacute; a ti.</em></span>
  </h2>
  <div class="problem-layout">
    <div class="reveal-left">
      <div class="quote-card">
        <p class="quote-text" data-en-block>&ldquo;I read three books on emotional regulation. Then my kid had a meltdown and I just&hellip; yelled. Again.&rdquo;</p>
        <p class="quote-text" data-es-block>&ldquo;Le&iacute; tres libros sobre regulaci&oacute;n emocional. Luego mi hijo tuvo una rabieta y yo simplemente&hellip; grit&eacute;. Otra vez.&rdquo;</p>
        <p class="quote-name"><span data-en>&mdash; Sofia, mom of a 4-year-old</span><span data-es>&mdash; Sof&iacute;a, mam&aacute; de un ni&ntilde;o de 4 a&ntilde;os</span></p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="reveal-right">
      <div class="problem-point">
        <div class="problem-icon">&#128218;</div>
        <div>
          <h3 data-en-block>Information overload, zero practice</h3>
          <h3 data-es-block>Demasiada informaci&oacute;n, cero pr&aacute;ctica</h3>
          <p data-en-block>Books, podcasts, Instagram reels &mdash; but no structured daily training system that bridges theory to behavior.</p>
          <p data-es-block>Libros, podcasts, reels &mdash; pero ning&uacute;n sistema de entrenamiento diario que una la teor&iacute;a con la conducta.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="problem-point">
        <div class="problem-icon">&#128548;</div>
        <div>
          <h3 data-en-block>Stress breaks good intentions</h3>
          <h3 data-es-block>El estr&eacute;s rompe las buenas intenciones</h3>
          <p data-en-block>Under pressure, your brain defaults to reactive patterns &mdash; not the mindful responses you&rsquo;ve read about.</p>
          <p data-es-block>Bajo presi&oacute;n, tu cerebro vuelve a los patrones reactivos, no a las respuestas conscientes que has le&iacute;do.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="problem-point">
        <div class="problem-icon">&#128532;</div>
        <div>
          <h3 data-en-block>Guilt fills the gap</h3>
          <h3 data-es-block>La culpa llena el vac&iacute;o</h3>
          <p data-en-block>Knowing what you &ldquo;should&rdquo; do but not being able to creates a cycle of shame that makes everything harder.</p>
          <p data-es-block>Saber lo que &ldquo;deber&iacute;as&rdquo; hacer pero no poder hacerlo crea un ciclo de verg&uuml;enza que lo empeora todo.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="how">
  <div class="solution-header">
    <div>
      <div class="section-label reveal"><span data-en>How GoParent Works</span><span data-es>C&oacute;mo funciona GoParent</span></div>
      <h2 class="reveal reveal-delay-1">
        <span data-en>Train behavior.<br>Not just <em>knowledge.</em></span>
        <span data-es>Entrena la conducta.<br>No solo el <em>conocimiento.</em></span>
      </h2>
    </div>
    <p class="section-desc reveal reveal-delay-2">
      <span data-en>5&ndash;10 minutes a day. A real-life challenge. A gentle check-in the next day. Repeated over time, this is what actually changes parenting behavior.</span>
      <span data-es>5&ndash;10 minutos al d&iacute;a. Un reto de la vida real. Un check-in al d&iacute;a siguiente. Repetido con el tiempo, esto es lo que realmente cambia la crianza.</span>
    </p>
  </div>
  <div>
    <div class="step reveal"><div class="step-num">01</div><div>
      <h3 data-en-block>Pick your session today</h3><h3 data-es-block>Elige tu sesi&oacute;n de hoy</h3>
      <p data-en-block>&#9889; Quick Win (1&ndash;2 min) for busy days, or &#128214; Full Unit (3&ndash;5 min) when you have more time. The app adapts to your life.</p>
      <p data-es-block>&#9889; Victoria R&aacute;pida (1&ndash;2 min) para d&iacute;as ocupados, o &#128214; Unidad Completa (3&ndash;5 min) cuando tienes m&aacute;s tiempo.</p>
    </div></div>
    <div class="step reveal reveal-delay-1"><div class="step-num">02</div><div>
      <h3 data-en-block>Get one concrete challenge</h3><h3 data-es-block>Recibe un reto concreto</h3>
      <p data-en-block>A micro-lesson or real-world task &mdash; age-specific, science-grounded, applicable the same day. Not theory. A thing to actually try.</p>
      <p data-es-block>Una micro-lecci&oacute;n o tarea real &mdash; espec&iacute;fica por edad, basada en evidencia y aplicable ese mismo d&iacute;a.</p>
    </div></div>
    <div class="step reveal reveal-delay-2"><div class="step-num">03</div><div>
      <h3 data-en-block>Try it. Even imperfectly.</h3><h3 data-es-block>Int&eacute;ntalo. Aunque sea imperfecto.</h3>
      <p data-en-block>&ldquo;I&rsquo;ll try it&rdquo; counts just as much as &ldquo;Yes!&rdquo; &mdash; because attempting is the behavior we&rsquo;re training. No perfection required.</p>
      <p data-es-block>&ldquo;Lo intentar&eacute;&rdquo; cuenta igual que &ldquo;&iexcl;S&iacute;!&rdquo; &mdash; porque intentarlo es la conducta que entrenamos.</p>
    </div></div>
    <div class="step reveal reveal-delay-3"><div class="step-num">04</div><div>
      <h3 data-en-block>Check in &mdash; without judgment</h3><h3 data-es-block>Haz seguimiento, sin juicio</h3>
      <p data-en-block>The next time you open the app: &ldquo;Did you get a chance to practice?&rdquo; No guilt if not. This is how RAVR captures real behavioral change.</p>
      <p data-es-block>La pr&oacute;xima vez que abras la app: &ldquo;&iquest;Pudiste practicarlo?&rdquo; Sin culpa si no.</p>
    </div></div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="ravr-wrap">
  <div class="ravr-section">
    <div class="blob rb1"></div><div class="blob rb2"></div>
    <div class="ravr-label">North Star Metric &middot; RAVR</div>
    <span class="ravr-number reveal" id="ravrNum">0%</span>
    <p class="ravr-desc reveal">
      <span data-en>of active users applying &ge;1 real-life parenting challenge per week. That&rsquo;s what we optimize &mdash; not screen time, not content consumed.</span>
      <span data-es>de usuarios activos que aplican &ge;1 reto real por semana. Eso optimizamos &mdash; no el tiempo en pantalla.</span>
    </p>
    <div class="ravr-meter reveal">
      <div class="meter-bar-bg"><div class="meter-bar-fill" id="meterFill"></div></div>
      <div class="meter-labels"><span>0%</span><span><span data-en>Target: 50%</span><span data-es>Objetivo: 50%</span></span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<section>
  <div class="section-label reveal"><span data-en>What&rsquo;s Inside</span><span data-es>Qu&eacute; hay dentro</span></div>
  <h2 class="reveal reveal-delay-1">
    <span data-en>Built for <em>real life.</em><br>Not for a scroll.</span>
    <span data-es>Construido para la <em>vida real.</em><br>No para el scroll.</span>
  </h2>
  <div class="features-grid">
    <div class="feature-card reveal"><span class="feature-emoji">&#129504;</span>
      <h3 data-en-block>Brain-based content</h3><h3 data-es-block>Contenido basado en neurociencia</h3>
      <p data-en-block>Every micro-lesson is grounded in The Whole Brain Child methodology &mdash; translated into plain language you can apply immediately.</p>
      <p data-es-block>Cada micro-lecci&oacute;n est&aacute; basada en la metodolog&iacute;a de El Cerebro del Ni&ntilde;o &mdash; traducida a lenguaje sencillo que puedes aplicar de inmediato.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-card reveal reveal-delay-1"><span class="feature-emoji">&#9889;</span>
      <h3 data-en-block>Two session formats</h3><h3 data-es-block>Dos formatos de sesi&oacute;n</h3>
      <p data-en-block>Quick Win (1&ndash;2 min) or Full Unit (3&ndash;5 min). You choose based on how your day is going.</p>
      <p data-es-block>Victoria R&aacute;pida (1&ndash;2 min) o Unidad Completa (3&ndash;5 min). T&uacute; eliges seg&uacute;n c&oacute;mo vaya el d&iacute;a.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-card reveal reveal-delay-2"><span class="feature-emoji">&#127919;</span>
      <h3 data-en-block>Age-specific precision</h3><h3 data-es-block>Precisi&oacute;n por edad</h3>
      <p data-en-block>Content adapts to your child&rsquo;s exact age range (0&ndash;2, 3&ndash;5, 6&ndash;8, 9&ndash;12) &mdash; because every stage needs a different response.</p>
      <p data-es-block>El contenido se adapta a la edad exacta de tu hijo (0&ndash;2, 3&ndash;5, 6&ndash;8, 9&ndash;12).</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-card reveal reveal-delay-3"><span class="feature-emoji">&#128172;</span>
      <h3 data-en-block>Script starters</h3><h3 data-es-block>Frases para empezar</h3>
      <p data-en-block>Exact words you can say. Because sometimes you know what to do but don&rsquo;t know how to start.</p>
      <p data-es-block>Las palabras exactas que puedes decir. A veces sabes qu&eacute; hacer pero no c&oacute;mo empezar.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-card reveal reveal-delay-4"><span class="feature-emoji">&#127807;</span>
      <h3 data-en-block>Zero judgment. Zero pressure.</h3><h3 data-es-block>Sin juicio. Sin presi&oacute;n.</h3>
      <p data-en-block>No guilt-trip streaks. No comparison. Progress is celebrated for the attempt, not the outcome.</p>
      <p data-es-block>Sin rachas que hagan sentir mal. Sin comparaciones. El progreso se celebra por el intento, no por el resultado.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section>
  <div class="section-label reveal"><span data-en>Early Parent Voices</span><span data-es>Voces de Padres Pioneros</span></div>
  <h2 class="reveal reveal-delay-1">
    <span data-en>What changes <em>first</em> is<br>how you feel, not how you act.</span>
    <span data-es>Lo primero que cambia<br>es <em>c&oacute;mo te sientes,</em> no c&oacute;mo act&uacute;as.</span>
  </h2>
  <div class="testimonials-grid">
    <div class="testimonial-card reveal"><div class="stars">&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;</div>
      <p class="testimonial-text" data-en-block>&ldquo;The script starters alone are worth it. I had a phrase ready when my son started melting down at the grocery store. It felt like having a coach in my pocket.&rdquo;</p>
      <p class="testimonial-text" data-es-block>&ldquo;Solo por las frases para empezar ya vale la pena. Ten&iacute;a una frase lista cuando mi hijo tuvo una rabieta en el supermercado.&rdquo;</p>
      <div class="testimonial-author"><div class="avatar av1">M</div><div><div class="author-name">Marta R.</div><div class="author-role"><span data-en>Mom of two, 3 &amp; 6 years</span><span data-es>Mam&aacute; de dos, 3 y 6 a&ntilde;os</span></div></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="testimonial-card reveal reveal-delay-1"><div class="stars">&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;</div>
      <p class="testimonial-text" data-en-block>&ldquo;I finally stopped feeling like a bad dad. Not because I got better overnight &mdash; but because GoParent reminded me every day that trying counts.&rdquo;</p>
      <p class="testimonial-text" data-es-block>&ldquo;Por fin dej&eacute; de sentirme mal padre. GoParent me recordaba cada d&iacute;a que intentarlo cuenta.&rdquo;</p>
      <div class="testimonial-author"><div class="avatar av2">D</div><div><div class="author-name">David L.</div><div class="author-role"><span data-en>First-time dad, 18-month-old</span><span data-es>Pap&aacute; primerizo, beb&eacute; de 18 meses</span></div></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="testimonial-card reveal reveal-delay-2"><div class="stars">&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;</div>
      <p class="testimonial-text" data-en-block>&ldquo;Other apps made me feel like I needed to read more. GoParent made me feel like I already had what I needed &mdash; I just needed the daily practice.&rdquo;</p>
      <p class="testimonial-text" data-es-block>&ldquo;Otras apps me hac&iacute;an sentir que necesitaba leer m&aacute;s. GoParent me hizo sentir que ya ten&iacute;a lo que necesitaba.&rdquo;</p>
      <div class="testimonial-author"><div class="avatar av3">A</div><div><div class="author-name">Ana V.</div><div class="author-role"><span data-en>Mom of a 5-year-old</span><span data-es>Mam&aacute; de un ni&ntilde;o de 5 a&ntilde;os</span></div></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="cta-section" id="cta">
  <div class="blob cb1"></div><div class="blob cb2"></div>
  <div class="section-label reveal"><span data-en>Free for the First 6 Months</span><span data-es>Gratis los Primeros 6 Meses</span></div>
  <h2 class="reveal reveal-delay-1">
    <span data-en>Your child won&rsquo;t remember<br>what you <em>knew.</em><br>They&rsquo;ll remember what you <em>did.</em></span>
    <span data-es>Tu hijo no recordar&aacute;<br>lo que <em>sab&iacute;as.</em><br>Recordar&aacute; lo que <em>hiciste.</em></span>
  </h2>
  <p class="section-desc reveal reveal-delay-2">
    <span data-en>Join parents who have stopped reading about better parenting and started practicing it.</span>
    <span data-es>Ún&eacute;te a los padres que han dejado de leer sobre c&oacute;mo criar mejor y han empezado a practicarlo.</span>
  </p>
  <div class="email-form reveal reveal-delay-3">
    <input type="email" class="email-input" placeholder="your@email.com" id="emailInput">
    <button class="btn-primary" onclick="handleSubmit()"><span data-en>Get Early Access</span><span data-es>Acceso Anticipado</span></button>
  </div>
  <p class="cta-note reveal reveal-delay-4">&#128274; <span data-en>Free to start. No credit card. No guilt trips.</span><span data-es>Gratis para empezar. Sin tarjeta. Sin culpa.</span></p>
  <div id="successMsg"><p>&#10024; <span data-en>You&rsquo;re on the list. We&rsquo;ll be in touch soon.</span><span data-es>Est&aacute;s en la lista. Te escribiremos pronto.</span></p></div>
</section>

<footer>
  <div class="footer-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="GoParent icon" style="height:30px;display:block;"> <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="goparent" style="height:22px;display:block;"></div>
  <p class="footer-copy"><span data-en>&copy; 2025 GoParent. All rights reserved.</span><span data-es>&copy; 2025 GoParent. Todos los derechos reservados.</span></p>
  <div class="footer-links">
    <a href="#"><span data-en>Privacy</span><span data-es>Privacidad</span></a>
    <a href="#"><span data-en>Terms</span><span data-es>T&eacute;rminos</span></a>
    <a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#e9818c858586a98e8699889b8c879dc7889999">Contact</a>
  </div>
</footer>

<div class="lang-toggle">
  <button class="lang-btn active" id="btnEn" onclick="setLang('en')">EN</button>
  <button class="lang-btn" id="btnEs" onclick="setLang('es')">ES</button>
</div>

<script data-cfasync="false" src="/cdn-cgi/scripts/5c5dd728/cloudflare-static/email-decode.min.js"></script>
<script>
function setLang(lang) {
  if (lang === 'es') {
    document.body.classList.add('es-active');
    document.getElementById('btnEs').classList.add('active');
    document.getElementById('btnEn').classList.remove('active');
  } else {
    document.body.classList.remove('es-active');
    document.getElementById('btnEn').classList.add('active');
    document.getElementById('btnEs').classList.remove('active');
  }
}
const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
  entries.forEach(el => {
    if (el.isIntersecting) {
      el.target.classList.add('visible');
      if (el.target.id === 'ravrNum') {
        animateRavr();
        document.getElementById('meterFill').style.width = '50%';
      }
    }
  });
}, { threshold: 0.12 });
document.querySelectorAll('.reveal, .reveal-left, .reveal-right, .stat, #ravrNum').forEach(el => observer.observe(el));
function animateRavr() {
  const el = document.getElementById('ravrNum');
  let count = 0;
  const timer = setInterval(() => {
    count++;
    el.textContent = count + '%';
    if (count >= 50) clearInterval(timer);
  }, 36);
}
function handleSubmit() {
  const input = document.getElementById('emailInput');
  if (input.value && input.value.includes('@')) {
    document.querySelector('.email-form').style.display = 'none';
    document.querySelector('.cta-note').style.display = 'none';
    document.getElementById('successMsg').style.display = 'block';
  } else {
    input.style.borderColor = '#e74c3c';
    input.focus();
    setTimeout(() => { input.style.borderColor = ''; }, 1500);
  }
}
document.getElementById('emailInput').addEventListener('keydown', e => {
  if (e.key === 'Enter') handleSubmit();
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
